---
title: "Chat with AI Steward — Design guidelines"
---
## Surface elevation

The panel is an overlay surface: background `--zen-color-bg-default`, border `--zen-border-default`, shadow `--zen-shadow-xl` (overlay tier per the foundations elevation scale; cards within the panel use `--zen-shadow-xs`). Elevation signals depth, not decoration — one elevated tier, no stacking.

## Identification

* Panel header: `ai` icon (sparkle) + "AI Steward" title.

* Per-insight marker: `ai` icon at 16px with accessible label "Generated by AI".

* Identification is never color-only. The purple primitives (`--zen-color-purple-*`) MAY accent the marker but are not the marker.

## Confidence indicator

Badge component (Number type) next to the source line: High / Medium / Low. Colors follow standard badge semantics — no AI-specific color coding.

## Streaming state

* While generating: skeleton shimmer blocks (foundations spec: 2000ms linear loop — currently not tokenized; flagged for the motion-token program) in the answer area, `aria-busy="true"` on the region.

* Completion announced via `aria-live="polite"`.

* Shimmer and any typewriter effect respect `prefers-reduced-motion` (static placeholder instead).

* Motion durations/easings: use the foundations motion tokens (status 🟡 Proposed — cite, don't invent values).

## States

Closed (entry point visible) · Open (Drawer) · Generating (shimmer + Stop/Cancel) · Answered (insight + source + confidence + actions) · Error (alert-banner inside panel, retry affordance).
